Maximum Number of Files to Track.name: Maximum Number of Files to Track
Maximum Number of Files to Track.displayName: Maximum Number of Files to Track

properties.missing_vlaues:
SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE 
WHERE city IS NULL OR city = '' 
   OR shipment_status IS NULL OR shipment_status = ''
properties.clean_records:
SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE 
WHERE package_weight_kg >= 0 
  AND city IS NOT NULL AND city <> '' 
  AND shipment_status IS NOT NULL AND shipment_status <> ''
properties.duplicate_shipments:
SELECT shipment_id, COUNT(*) AS duplicate_count
FROM FLOWFILE
GROUP BY shipment_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
